evidence_hint: src/inventory.ts:302-304 — `try { injectFile(...) } catch { if (targetIncludes(schema,'sidecar')) writeSidecar(...) }` discards the injection error; if schema doesn't target sidecar, no fallback AND no record.
residual_if_not_resolved: Push `header_injection_failed:${msg}` onto rec.unknowns (mirroring inventory.ts:204-206) and log before falling back to sidecar.
